title: Create Nuclear Radiation
description: Addon for the Create Nuclear mod. Adder radiation after the reactor explosion.
body:
# Create Nuclear Radiation
## Supported languages:
### - English
### - Russain

## Changes ⚙
- To protect yourself from radiation, you need to wear a full protective suit.
- When wearing a protective suit, the radiation dose is reduced to:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 > to 5 RAD/s - 20%

 > From 5 to 7 RAD/s - 40%

 > From 7 to 9 RAD/s - 60%

 > From 9 to 10 RAD/s - 80%

</details>



## Additions 🎇
### Reactor 💥
- After the reactor explodes, a crater remains, and a radioactive block falls out. Beyond the crater, there is dead land, and all the grass disappears (gallery).
- The explosion creates an explosive wave that destroys blocks in its path (gallery).

### Radioactive block ☢️
**Block as an item**
- If an entity picks up a block, it will immediately die from an overdose of radiation.
- Sets the player on fire within a 20-block radius.

**Radioactive field**
- Чем ближе к radioactive block, тем больше радиации получите. (подробней в дозиметре)

### Dozimeter 📟
- If you press pkm while holding a dosimeter, you can see the radiation background and the absorbed dose. Radiation background - shows the absorption of radiation per second. Absorbed dose - the total amount of absorbed dose.

### Beetroot ✨
- Eating beetroot will reduce the radiation by 5% of your dose

### Radiation ☢️
- 200 radiation: there is a 45% chance of blindness.
- 300 radiation: there is a 20% chance of confusion.
- 400 radiation: there is a 20% chance of severe poisoning.

### Immunity 💪
- Each player now has their own immunity. Experience for leveling up is gained when the radiation decreases (over time). It can also be issued via a command

### Plans 📋
- Coming soon:
  > Decorative blocks made of death wood.

  > New visual reactor explosion (particle).

  > ~~Immunity to radiation (everyone will have their own logic for variety)~~ (05.06.2026 1.0.7-BETA) .
  
  > ~~Beautiful text for the dosimeter.~~ (28.05.2026)

  > ~~Add Neoforge 1.21.1~~ (25.06.2026)
